headline: TKO Group (TKO) Announces Multi-Year Arizona Events Partnership
summary: TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:TKO) is one of the 10 Fastest Growing S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 12, 2026, TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:TKO), together with the Arizona Sports & Events Alliance, announced a multi-year partnership to bring a series of UFC, WWE, PBR, and Zuffa Boxing events to Arizona. The seven-event […]

headline: UFC Makes Its Return to Abu Dhabi With a Blockbuster Fight Night on July 25
summary: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates, May 18, 2026--UFC®, the world’s premier mixed martial arts organization, together with the Department of Culture and Tourism – Abu Dhabi (DCT Abu Dhabi), announces its highly anticipated return to the region with UFC® FIGHT NIGHT ABU DHABI on Saturday, 25th July 2026, live from Etihad Arena on Yas Island.

headline: TKO president reveals big plans for WWE, UFC
summary: TKO president Mark Shapiro shares exclusive insights with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi on the booming business and massive global expansion of live entertainment.
